description: The BoxBrushTool component is a tool that draws clouds of rotated, scaled, and UV mapped boxes as part of a BoxArrayMesh.

fields.Pivot: The offset of the rotation Pivot of each box.
fields.MinColor: The min color that each box can be.
fields.MaxColor: The max color that each box can be.
fields.ColorGap: the bias for the random colors for boxes.
fields.UniformSize: Whether all boxes should be the same size always.
fields.MinSize: the min size a drawn box can be.
fields.MaxSize: the max size a drawn box can be.
fields.SizeGap: the bias for the random size for boxes.
fields.MinRotation: the minimum rotation of each box.
fields.MaxRotation: the maximum rotation of each box.
fields.MinUVScale: the minimum UV scale of each box.
fields.MaxUVScale: the maximum uv scale of each box.
fields.UVScaleGap: the bias of the uv scale of each box.
fields.RotationSpace: The transform space that should be used when applying rotation to the boxes.
fields.UseColor: Whether the boxes should have vertex colors.
fields.ScaleUVWithSize: Whether boxes should have more UV detail the bigger they are.

methods.ChangeSize: Handles changing the size of the brush of a brush tool.
